headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock on Our Buy List and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.

headline: Carrier Global: Valuation Frontrunning Elusive Growth
summary: Carrier Global (CARR) rated HOLD with a $67.16 target as valuation, leverage, and Europe weakness offset data center cooling growth. See more details here.
